bead.title: Phase 5: delete cli/internal/agent/{state,registry}.go (moved upstream as agent-713e9a99)
bead.description:
Delete state.go (216 lines) + registry.go (263 lines) from DDx — they are mutually dependent (state.go depends on Harness/Registry/HarnessState from registry.go). Both moved upstream into agent internal/harnesses/ via agent-713e9a99.

Pre-condition: agent-713e9a99 landed; agent-49e35134 (ListHarnesses) consumed by DDx (via cmd/agent_check.go bead and agent_runner adapter).

Any DDx code that referenced Harness/Registry/HarnessState as DDx types must already have migrated to the contract types via the legacy/ adapter or directly to agentlib types.
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] cli/internal/agent/state.go and cli/internal/agent/registry.go do not exist
- [ ] No remaining references to those types in DDx (compile passes)
- [ ] Tests pass
